game_meta.title: BUILD-A-BOX
game_meta.subtitle: An experience created by Smurfit Westrock

intro.headline: CONGRATULATIONS!
intro.body:
YOU ARE IN CHARGE OF DESIGNING PACKAGING SOLUTIONS FOR SMURFIT WESTROCK CUSTOMERS.

SELECT THE DESIGN FEATURES THAT BEST FULFILL THE ASSIGNED MISSION AND CREATE THE IDEAL SOLUTION TO STAND OUT AT THE POINT OF SALE.

rules.headline: HOW TO PLAY
rules.body:
The game consists of traveling through 3 different portals where you will get to choose the features for your packaging design.

Once you make your choice, the door will light up red, and you will be able to advance to the next level.

brief_bullets: Position their flagship snack (Cheese Flavor) in warehouse club store.
They need packaging that helps identify the product at the point of sale and adapts to the store format they want to enter.
Currently have no presence in club store.
mission_monster_snacks.summary: Monster Snacks is a recognized brand in the market. Currently have no presence in club store.
mission_monster_snacks.call_to_action: HELP MONSTER SNACKS TO HAVE A GREAT DEBUT. LET'S CREATE!

tray_type.title: Choose your tray style
tray_type.subtitle: Which tray design best fits this mission?

paper_type.title: Choose your paper
paper_type.subtitle: Which substrate fits the brand and budget?

options.name: Kraft Paper
bullets: When printed on, some colors can become dull or low-contrast.

graphic_element.title: Choose the primary graphic
graphic_element.subtitle: What should dominate the printed face?

options.name: Brand's Logo
bullets: Identify products from the same family.

options.name: Product's Characteristics
bullets: Guide the buyer to what it needs from the product.
Good support for new products in the market.

options.name: Key Differentiator / Slogan
bullets: Connect with consumers with previous knowledge of the brand.

result.headline: YOUR BOX IS READY!
result.body_template: You designed a {tray_name} in {paper_name} featuring the {graphic_name} as the dominant graphic.

score_tiers.label: Solid first draft
score_tiers.message: Great start — a few tweaks and this could really pop at shelf.

score_tiers.label: Strong design
score_tiers.message: Nicely balanced for the mission. Monster Snacks will be noticed.

score_tiers.label: Shelf-stopper!
score_tiers.message: Perfect fit for the club store format. Monster Snacks makes a great debut.
